title: Fix $time not rounding up (#4790)
body:
This pull request relates to this issue: https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/4790

The $time function was returning the wrong value. It was truncating, not rounding.

For example, this was returning 1

```
timeunit 10ns

initial
  begin
    #(16ns);
    $display("This should return 2, got(%0d)", $time());
  end

```
